You are working on the pinterest/ktlint repository.
The codebase is at version 0.50 (commit: 2c163c68).

## Issue to Resolve

Change default code style to `ktlint_official`
Starting of ktlint `1.0` the default code style changes from `intellij_idea` (former `kotlin_official`) to `ktlint_official`. The  `ktlint_official` codestyle  adheres to the best parts of  the [Kotlin Coding Conventions](https://kotlinlang.org/docs/coding-conventions.html) and [Android Kotlint styleguid](https://developer.android.com/kotlin/style-guide). But it no longer is restricted to produce code compatible with the default IntelliJ IDEA formatter which  lacks from bug which still are not resolved after multiple years.

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `ktlint-rule-engine-core/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/rule/engine/core/api/editorconfig/CodeStyleEditorConfigProperty.kt`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/ClassSignatureRule.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

 5тЖТ
 6тЖТ/**
 7тЖТ * Code style to be used while linting and formatting. Note that the [EnumValueParser] requires values to be lowercase.
 8тЖТ */
 9тЖТ@Suppress("EnumEntryName")
10тЖТpublic enum class CodeStyleValue {
11тЖТ    /**
12тЖТ     * Code formatting based on Android's Kotlin styleguide (https://developer.android.com/kotlin/style-guide). This
13тЖТ     * code style aims to be compatible with code formatting in Android Studio.
14тЖТ     */
15тЖТ    android_studio,
16тЖТ
17тЖТ    /**
18тЖТ     * Code formatting based on Kotlin Coding conventions (https://kotlinlang.org/docs/coding-conventions.html). This
19тЖТ     * code style aims to be compatible with code formatting in IntelliJ IDEA.
20тЖТ     */
21тЖТ    intellij_idea,
22тЖТ
23тЖТ    /**
24тЖТ     * Code formatting based on the best of both the Kotlin Coding conventions
25тЖТ     * (https://kotlinlang.org/docs/coding-conventions.html) and Android's Kotlin styleguide
26тЖТ     * (https://developer.android.com/kotlin/style-guide). This codestyle also provides additional formatting on topics
27тЖТ     * which are not (explicitly) mentioned in the before mentioned styleguide. Also, this code style sometimes formats
28тЖТ     * code in a way which is not compatible with the default code formatters in IntelliJ IDEA and Android Studio. When
29тЖТ     * using this codestyle, it is best to disable (e.g. not use) automatic code formatting in the editor. Mean reason
30тЖТ     * for deviating from the code formatting provided by the editor is that those contain bugs which after some years
31тЖТ     * are still not fixed.
32тЖТ     * In the long run, this code style becomes the default code style provided by KtLint.
33тЖТ     */
34тЖТ    ktlint_official,
35тЖТ}
36тЖТ
37тЖТpublic val CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY_TYPE: PropertyType.LowerCasingPropertyType<CodeStyleValue> =
38тЖТ    PropertyType.LowerCasingPropertyType(
39тЖТ        "ktlint_code_style",
40тЖТ        "The code style ('intellij_idea', 'android_studio' or 'ktlint_official') to be applied. Currently, the " +
41тЖТ            "value is defaulted to 'intellij_idea' when not set. However, in the future the default code style " +
42тЖТ            "will be changed to 'ktlint_official'.",
43тЖТ        SafeEnumValueParser(CodeStyleValue::class.java),
44тЖТ        CodeStyleValue.values().map { it.name }.toSet(),

46тЖТ
47тЖТpublic val CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY: EditorConfigProperty<CodeStyleValue> =

50тЖТ        /*
51тЖТ         * Once the [CodeStyleValue.ktlint_official] is matured, it will become the default code style of ktlint. Until
52тЖТ         * then the [CodeStyleValue.intellij_idea] is used to remain backwards compatible.
53тЖТ         */
54тЖТ        defaultValue = CodeStyleValue.intellij_idea,

 49тЖТ/**
 50тЖТ * Formats the class signature according to https://kotlinlang.org/docs/coding-conventions.html#class-headers
 51тЖТ *
 52тЖТ * In code style `ktlint_official` class headers containing 2 or more parameters are formatted as multiline signature. As the Kotlin Coding
 53тЖТ * conventions do not specify what is meant with a "few parameters", no default is set for other code styles.
 54тЖТ */
 55тЖТpublic class ClassSignatureRule :
 56тЖТ    StandardRule(
 57тЖТ        id = "class-signature",
 58тЖТ        visitorModifiers =
 59тЖТ            setOf(
 60тЖТ                // Run after wrapping and spacing rules
 61тЖТ                RunAsLateAsPossible,
 62тЖТ                RunAfterRule(DISCOURAGED_COMMENT_LOCATION_RULE_ID, ONLY_WHEN_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_AND_ENABLED),
 63тЖТ            ),
 64тЖТ        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 65тЖТ            setOf(
 66тЖТ                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 67тЖТ                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 68тЖТ                MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY,
 69тЖТ                FORCE_MULTILINE_WHEN_PARAMETER_COUNT_GREATER_OR_EQUAL_THAN_PROPERTY,
 70тЖТ            ),
 71тЖТ    ),
 72тЖТ    Rule.Experimental {
 73тЖТ    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 74тЖТ    private var indentConfig = DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 75тЖТ    private var maxLineLength = MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 76тЖТ    private var classSignatureWrappingMinimumParameters = FORCE_MULTILINE_WHEN_PARAMETER_COUNT_GREATER_OR_EQUAL_THAN_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 77тЖТ
 78тЖТ    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 79тЖТ        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 80тЖТ        classSignatureWrappingMinimumParameters = editorConfig[FORCE_MULTILINE_WHEN_PARAMETER_COUNT_GREATER_OR_EQUAL_THAN_PROPERTY]
 81тЖТ        indentConfig =
 82тЖТ            IndentConfig(
 83тЖТ                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 84тЖТ                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 85тЖТ            )
 86тЖТ        maxLineLength = editorConfig[MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY]
 87тЖТ    }
 88тЖТ
 89тЖТ    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 90тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
 91тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 92тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 93тЖТ    ) {
 94тЖТ        if (node.elementType == CLASS) {
 95тЖТ            visitClass(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 96тЖТ        }
 97тЖТ    }
 98тЖТ
 99тЖТ    private fun ASTNode.classSignatureNodes(excludeSuperTypes: Boolean): List<ASTNode> {
100тЖТ        // Find the nodes that are to be placed on the same line if no max line length is set
101тЖТ        //     internal class Foo(bar: String) { // Class without super type
102тЖТ        // or
103тЖТ        //     public class Foo(bar: String) : Bar { // Class with exactly one super type
104тЖТ        // or
105тЖТ        //     private class Foo(bar: String) : // Class with multiple super types which have to be wrapped to next lines
106тЖТ        val firstCodeChild = getFirstChildInSignature()
107тЖТ        val lastNodeInPrimaryClassSignatureLine =
108тЖТ            takeIf { excludeSuperTypes }
109тЖТ                // When the class extends multiple super types or if the super type list contains a newline, all super types are wrapped
110тЖТ                // on separate line
111тЖТ                ?.findChildByType(COLON)
112тЖТ                ?: findChildByType(CLASS_BODY)?.firstChildNode
113тЖТ        return collectLeavesRecursively()
114тЖТ            .childrenBetween(
115тЖТ                startASTNodePredicate = { it == firstCodeChild },
116тЖТ                endASTNodePredicate = { it == lastNodeInPrimaryClassSignatureLine },
117тЖТ            )
118тЖТ    }
119тЖТ
120тЖТ    private fun ASTNode.superTypes() =
121тЖТ        findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST)
122тЖТ            ?.children()
123тЖТ            ?.filterNot { it.isWhiteSpace() || it.isPartOfComment() || it.elementType == COMMA }
124тЖТ
125тЖТ    private fun ASTNode.hasMultilineSuperTypeList() = findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST)?.textContains('\n') == true
126тЖТ
127тЖТ    private fun ASTNode.getFirstChildInSignature(): ASTNode? {
128тЖТ        findChildByType(MODIFIER_LIST)
129тЖТ            ?.let { modifierList ->
130тЖТ                val iterator = modifierList.children().iterator()
131тЖТ                var currentNode: ASTNode
132тЖТ                while (iterator.hasNext()) {
133тЖТ                    currentNode = iterator.next()
134тЖТ                    if (currentNode.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
135тЖТ                        currentNode.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY &&
136тЖТ                        currentNode.elementType != WHITE_SPACE
137тЖТ                    ) {
138тЖТ                        return currentNode
139тЖТ                    }
140тЖТ                }
141тЖТ                return modifierList.nextCodeSibling()
142тЖТ            }
143тЖТ        return nextCodeLeaf()
144тЖТ    }

146тЖТ    private fun visitClass(
147тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
148тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
149тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
150тЖТ    ) {
151тЖТ        require(node.elementType == CLASS)
152тЖТ
153тЖТ        val wrapPrimaryConstructorParameters =
154тЖТ            node.hasMinimumNumberOfParameters() ||
155тЖТ                node.containsMultilineParameter() ||
156тЖТ                (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.containsAnnotatedParameter()) ||
157тЖТ                (isMaxLineLengthSet() && classSignatureExcludingSuperTypesExceedsMaxLineLength(node, emit, autoCorrect)) ||
158тЖТ                (!isMaxLineLengthSet() && node.classSignatureExcludingSuperTypesIsMultiline())
159тЖТ        fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = wrapPrimaryConstructorParameters, dryRun = false)
160тЖТ        fixWhitespacesInSuperTypeList(node, emit, autoCorrect, wrappedPrimaryConstructor = wrapPrimaryConstructorParameters)
161тЖТ        fixClassBody(node, emit, autoCorrect)
162тЖТ    }

164тЖТ    private fun classSignatureExcludingSuperTypesExceedsMaxLineLength(
165тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
166тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
167тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
168тЖТ    ): Boolean {
169тЖТ        val actualClassSignatureLength = node.getClassSignatureLength(excludeSuperTypes = true)
170тЖТ        // Calculate the length of the class signature in case it, excluding the super types, would be rewritten as single
171тЖТ        // line (and without a maximum line length). The white space correction will be calculated via a dry run of the
172тЖТ        // actual fix.
173тЖТ        val length =
174тЖТ            actualClassSignatureLength +
175тЖТ                // Calculate the white space correction in case the signature would be rewritten to a single line
176тЖТ                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = false, dryRun = true)
177тЖТ        return length > maxLineLength
178тЖТ    }

212тЖТ    private fun fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(
213тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
214тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
215тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
216тЖТ        multiline: Boolean,
217тЖТ        dryRun: Boolean,
218тЖТ    ): Int {
219тЖТ        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
220тЖТ
221тЖТ        val primaryConstructorParameterList = node.getPrimaryConstructorParameterListOrNull()
222тЖТ        val hasNoValueParameters =
223тЖТ            primaryConstructorParameterList
224тЖТ                ?.children()
225тЖТ                .orEmpty()
226тЖТ                .none { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
227тЖТ
228тЖТ        whiteSpaceCorrection +=
229тЖТ            if (hasNoValueParameters) {
230тЖТ                fixWhiteSpacesInEmptyValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, dryRun)
231тЖТ            } else {
232тЖТ                fixWhiteSpacesBeforeFirstParameterInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun) +
233тЖТ                    fixWhiteSpacesBetweenParametersInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun) +
234тЖТ                    fixWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun)
235тЖТ            }
236тЖТ
237тЖТ        return whiteSpaceCorrection
238тЖТ    }
239тЖТ
240тЖТ    private fun fixWhiteSpacesInEmptyValueParameterList(
241тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
242тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
243тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
244тЖТ        dryRun: Boolean,
245тЖТ    ): Int {
246тЖТ        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
247тЖТ
248тЖТ        node
249тЖТ            .getPrimaryConstructorParameterListOrNull()
250тЖТ            ?.takeUnless { it.containsComment() }
251тЖТ            ?.let { parameterList ->
252тЖТ                if (!dryRun) {
253тЖТ                    emit(parameterList.startOffset, "No parenthesis expected", true)
254тЖТ                }
255тЖТ                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
256тЖТ                    parameterList.treeParent.removeChild(parameterList)
257тЖТ                } else {
258тЖТ                    whiteSpaceCorrection -= parameterList.textLength
259тЖТ                }
260тЖТ            }
261тЖТ
262тЖТ        return whiteSpaceCorrection
263тЖТ    }
264тЖТ
265тЖТ    private fun ASTNode.containsComment() = children().any { it.isPartOfComment() }

267тЖТ    private fun fixWhiteSpacesBeforeFirstParameterInValueParameterList(
268тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
269тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
270тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
271тЖТ        multiline: Boolean,
272тЖТ        dryRun: Boolean,
273тЖТ    ): Int {
274тЖТ        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
275тЖТ
276тЖТ        val valueParameterList = node.getPrimaryConstructorParameterListOrNull()
277тЖТ        val firstParameterInList =
278тЖТ            valueParameterList
279тЖТ                ?.children()
280тЖТ                ?.first { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
281тЖТ                ?: return 0
282тЖТ
283тЖТ        val firstParameter = firstParameterInList.firstChildNode
284тЖТ        firstParameter
285тЖТ            ?.prevLeaf()
286тЖТ            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
287тЖТ            .let { whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier ->
288тЖТ                if (multiline) {
289тЖТ                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
290тЖТ                        !whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.textContains('\n')
291тЖТ                    ) {
292тЖТ                        if (!dryRun) {
293тЖТ                            emit(firstParameterInList.startOffset, "Newline expected after opening parenthesis", true)
294тЖТ                        }
295тЖТ                        // Let indent rule determine the exact indent
296тЖТ                        val expectedParameterIndent = indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)
297тЖТ                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
298тЖТ                            valueParameterList.firstChildNode.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(expectedParameterIndent)
299тЖТ                        } else {
300тЖТ                            whiteSpaceCorrection += expectedParameterIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
301тЖТ                        }
302тЖТ                    }
303тЖТ                } else {
304тЖТ                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier != null) {
305тЖТ                        if (!dryRun) {
306тЖТ                            emit(
307тЖТ                                firstParameter!!.startOffset,
308тЖТ                                "No whitespace expected between opening parenthesis and first parameter name",
309тЖТ                                true,
310тЖТ                            )
311тЖТ                        }
312тЖТ                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
313тЖТ                            whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier)
314тЖТ                        } else {
315тЖТ                            whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.textLength
316тЖТ                        }
317тЖТ                    }
318тЖТ                }
319тЖТ            }
320тЖТ
321тЖТ        return whiteSpaceCorrection
322тЖТ    }
323тЖТ
324тЖТ    private fun fixWhiteSpacesBetweenParametersInValueParameterList(
325тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
326тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
327тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
328тЖТ        multiline: Boolean,
329тЖТ        dryRun: Boolean,
330тЖТ    ): Int {
331тЖТ        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
332тЖТ
333тЖТ        val valueParameterList = node.getPrimaryConstructorParameterListOrNull()
334тЖТ        val firstParameterInList =
335тЖТ            valueParameterList
336тЖТ                ?.children()
337тЖТ                ?.first { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
338тЖТ                ?: return 0
339тЖТ
340тЖТ        valueParameterList
341тЖТ            .children()
342тЖТ            .filter { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
343тЖТ            .filter { it != firstParameterInList }
344тЖТ            .forEach { valueParameter ->
345тЖТ                val firstChildNodeInValueParameter = valueParameter.firstChildNode
346тЖТ                firstChildNodeInValueParameter
347тЖТ                    ?.prevLeaf()
348тЖТ                    ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
349тЖТ                    .let { whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier ->
350тЖТ                        if (multiline) {
351тЖТ                            if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
352тЖТ                                !whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.textContains('\n')
353тЖТ                            ) {
354тЖТ                                if (!dryRun) {
355тЖТ                                    emit(valueParameter.startOffset, "Parameter should start on a newline", true)
356тЖТ                                }
357тЖТ                                // Let IndentationRule determine the exact indent
358тЖТ                                val expectedParameterIndent = indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)
359тЖТ                                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
360тЖТ                                    firstChildNodeInValueParameter.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedParameterIndent)
361тЖТ                                } else {
362тЖТ                                    whiteSpaceCorrection += expectedParameterIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
363тЖТ                                }
364тЖТ                            }
365тЖТ                        } else {
366тЖТ                            if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null || whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != " ") {
367тЖТ                                if (!dryRun) {
368тЖТ                                    emit(firstChildNodeInValueParameter!!.startOffset, "Single whitespace expected before parameter", true)
369тЖТ                                }
370тЖТ                                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
371тЖТ                                    firstChildNodeInValueParameter.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
372тЖТ                                } else {
373тЖТ                                    whiteSpaceCorrection += 1 - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
374тЖТ                                }
375тЖТ                            }
376тЖТ                        }
377тЖТ                    }
378тЖТ            }
379тЖТ
380тЖТ        return whiteSpaceCorrection
381тЖТ    }

383тЖТ    private fun fixWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis(
384тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
385тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
386тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
387тЖТ        multiline: Boolean,
388тЖТ        dryRun: Boolean,
389тЖТ    ): Int {
390тЖТ        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
391тЖТ
392тЖТ        val closingParenthesisPrimaryConstructor =
393тЖТ            node
394тЖТ                .getPrimaryConstructorParameterListOrNull()
395тЖТ                ?.findChildByType(RPAR)
396тЖТ        closingParenthesisPrimaryConstructor
397тЖТ            ?.prevSibling()
398тЖТ            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
399тЖТ            .let { whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis ->
400тЖТ                if (multiline) {
401тЖТ                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis == null ||
402тЖТ                        !whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.textContains('\n')
403тЖТ                    ) {
404тЖТ                        if (!dryRun) {
405тЖТ                            emit(closingParenthesisPrimaryConstructor!!.startOffset, "Newline expected before closing parenthesis", true)
406тЖТ                        }
407тЖТ                        // Let IndentationRule determine the exact indent
408тЖТ                        val expectedParameterIndent = node.indent()
409тЖТ                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
410тЖТ                            closingParenthesisPrimaryConstructor!!.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedParameterIndent)
411тЖТ                        } else {
412тЖТ                            whiteSpaceCorrection += expectedParameterIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis?.textLength ?: 0)
413тЖТ                        }
414тЖТ                    }
415тЖТ                } else {
416тЖТ                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis != null &&
417тЖТ                        whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.nextLeaf()?.elementType == RPAR
418тЖТ                    ) {
419тЖТ                        if (!dryRun) {
420тЖТ                            emit(
421тЖТ                                whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.startOffset,
422тЖТ                                "No whitespace expected between last parameter and closing parenthesis",
423тЖТ                                true,
424тЖТ                            )
425тЖТ                        }
426тЖТ                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
427тЖТ                            whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis)
428тЖТ                        } else {
429тЖТ                            whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.textLength
430тЖТ                        }
431тЖТ                    }
432тЖТ                }
433тЖТ            }
434тЖТ        return whiteSpaceCorrection
435тЖТ    }

437тЖТ    private fun fixWhitespacesInSuperTypeList(
438тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
439тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
440тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
441тЖТ        wrappedPrimaryConstructor: Boolean,
442тЖТ    ): Int {
443тЖТ        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
444тЖТ
445тЖТ        val superTypes = node.superTypes() ?: return 0
446тЖТ
447тЖТ        if (superTypes.first().elementType != SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY) {
448тЖТ            superTypes
449тЖТ                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY }
450тЖТ                ?.let { superTypeCallEntry ->
451тЖТ                    emit(superTypeCallEntry.startOffset, "Super type call must be first super type", true)
452тЖТ                    if (autoCorrect) {
453тЖТ                        val superTypeList = node.findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST) ?: return 0
454тЖТ                        val originalFirstSuperType = superTypes.first()
455тЖТ                        val commaBeforeSuperTypeCall = requireNotNull(superTypeCallEntry.prevSibling { it.elementType == COMMA })
456тЖТ
457тЖТ                        // Remove the whitespace before the super type call and do not insert a new whitespace as it will be fixed later
458тЖТ                        superTypeCallEntry
459тЖТ                            .prevSibling()
460тЖТ                            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
461тЖТ                            ?.let { whitespaceBeforeSuperTypeCallEntry ->
462тЖТ                                superTypeList.removeChild(whitespaceBeforeSuperTypeCallEntry)
463тЖТ                            }
464тЖТ
465тЖТ                        superTypeList.addChild(superTypeCallEntry, superTypes.first())
466тЖТ                        superTypeList.addChild(commaBeforeSuperTypeCall, originalFirstSuperType)
467тЖТ                    }
468тЖТ                }
469тЖТ        }
470тЖТ
471тЖТ        if (superTypes.count() == 1) {
472тЖТ            if (wrappedPrimaryConstructor) {
473тЖТ                // Format
474тЖТ                //     class ClassWithPrimaryConstructorWhichWillBeWrapped(...) :
475тЖТ                //         SomeSuperTypeEntry
476тЖТ                // to
477тЖТ                //     class ClassWithPrimaryConstructorWhichWillBeWrapped(
478тЖТ                //         ...
479тЖТ                //     ) : SomeSuperTypeEntry
480тЖТ                superTypes
481тЖТ                    .first()
482тЖТ                    .let { firstSuperType ->
483тЖТ                        firstSuperType
484тЖТ                            .prevLeaf()
485тЖТ                            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
486тЖТ                            ?.let { whiteSpaceBeforeSuperType ->
487тЖТ                                val expectedWhitespace = " "
488тЖТ                                if (whiteSpaceBeforeSuperType.text != expectedWhitespace) {
489тЖТ                                    emit(firstSuperType.startOffset, "Expected single space before the super type", true)
490тЖТ                                    if (autoCorrect) {
491тЖТ                                        firstSuperType.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedWhitespace)
492тЖТ                                    }
493тЖТ                                }
494тЖТ                            }
495тЖТ                    }
496тЖТ            } else {
497тЖТ                superTypes
498тЖТ                    .first()
499тЖТ                    .firstChildNode
500тЖТ                    ?.let { superTypeFirstChildNode ->
501тЖТ                        superTypeFirstChildNode
502тЖТ                            .prevLeaf()
503тЖТ                            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
504тЖТ                            .let { whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier ->
505тЖТ                                if (node.hasMultilineSuperTypeList() ||
506тЖТ                                    classSignaturesIncludingFirstSuperTypeExceedsMaxLineLength(node, emit, autoCorrect)
507тЖТ                                ) {
508тЖТ                                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
509тЖТ                                        !whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.textContains('\n')
510тЖТ                                    ) {
511тЖТ                                        emit(superTypeFirstChildNode.startOffset, "Super type should start on a newline", true)
512тЖТ                                        if (autoCorrect) {
513тЖТ                                            // Let IndentationRule determine the exact indent
514тЖТ                                            superTypeFirstChildNode.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node))
515тЖТ                                        }
516тЖТ                                    }
517тЖТ                                } else {
518тЖТ                                    val expectedWhitespace = " "
519тЖТ                                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
520тЖТ                                        whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != expectedWhitespace
521тЖТ                                    ) {
522тЖТ                                        emit(superTypeFirstChildNode.startOffset, "Expected single space before the super type", true)
523тЖТ                                        if (autoCorrect) {
524тЖТ                                            superTypeFirstChildNode.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedWhitespace)
525тЖТ                                        }
526тЖТ                                    }
527тЖТ                                }
528тЖТ                            }
529тЖТ                    }
530тЖТ            }
531тЖТ        } else {
532тЖТ            superTypes
533тЖТ                .forEachIndexed { index, superType ->
534тЖТ                    val firstChildNodeInSuperType = superType.firstChildNode
535тЖТ                    firstChildNodeInSuperType
536тЖТ                        ?.prevLeaf()
537тЖТ                        ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
538тЖТ                        .let { whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier ->
539тЖТ                            if (index == 0 && node.hasMultilinePrimaryConstructor()) {
540тЖТ                                val expectedWhitespace = " "
541тЖТ                                if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
542тЖТ                                    whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != expectedWhitespace
543тЖТ                                ) {
544тЖТ                                    emit(firstChildNodeInSuperType.startOffset, "Expected single space before the first super type", true)
545тЖТ                                    if (autoCorrect) {
546тЖТ                                        firstChildNodeInSuperType.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedWhitespace)
547тЖТ                                    }
548тЖТ                                }
549тЖТ                            } else {
550тЖТ                                if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
551тЖТ                                    !whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.textContains('\n')
552тЖТ                                ) {
553тЖТ                                    emit(firstChildNodeInSuperType.startOffset, "Super type should start on a newline", true)
554тЖТ                                    if (autoCorrect) {
555тЖТ                                        // Let IndentationRule determine the exact indent
556тЖТ                                        firstChildNodeInSuperType.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node))
557тЖТ                                    }
558тЖТ                                }
559тЖТ                            }
560тЖТ                        }
561тЖТ                }
562тЖТ        }
563тЖТ
564тЖТ        return whiteSpaceCorrection
565тЖТ    }

567тЖТ    private fun classSignaturesIncludingFirstSuperTypeExceedsMaxLineLength(
568тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
569тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
570тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
571тЖТ    ): Boolean {
572тЖТ        val actualClassSignatureLength = node.getClassSignatureLength(excludeSuperTypes = false)
573тЖТ        // Calculate the length of the class signature in case it, including the super types, would be rewritten as single
574тЖТ        // line (and without a maximum line length). The white space correction will be calculated via a dry run of the
575тЖТ        // actual fix.
576тЖТ        val length =
577тЖТ            actualClassSignatureLength +
578тЖТ                // Calculate the white space correction in case the signature would be rewritten to a single line
579тЖТ                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = false, dryRun = true)
580тЖТ        return length > maxLineLength
581тЖТ    }

590тЖТ    private fun fixClassBody(

622тЖТ    private fun List<ASTNode>.childrenBetween(
623тЖТ        startASTNodePredicate: (ASTNode) -> Boolean,
624тЖТ        endASTNodePredicate: (ASTNode) -> Boolean,
625тЖТ    ): List<ASTNode> {
626тЖТ        val iterator = iterator()
627тЖТ        var currentNode: ASTNode
628тЖТ        val childrenBetween: MutableList<ASTNode> = mutableListOf()
629тЖТ
630тЖТ        while (iterator.hasNext()) {
631тЖТ            currentNode = iterator.next()
632тЖТ            if (startASTNodePredicate(currentNode)) {
633тЖТ                childrenBetween.add(currentNode)
634тЖТ                break
635тЖТ            }
636тЖТ        }
637тЖТ

437тЖТ    private fun fixWhitespacesInSuperTypeList(

445тЖТ        val superTypes = node.superTypes() ?: return 0

447тЖТ        if (superTypes.first().elementType != SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY) {
448тЖТ            superTypes

462тЖТ                                superTypeList.removeChild(whitespaceBeforeSuperTypeCallEntry)

516тЖТ                                    }
517тЖТ                                } else {

521тЖТ                                    ) {

542тЖТ                                    whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != expectedWhitespace

547тЖТ                                    }
548тЖТ                                }
549тЖТ                            } else {

551тЖТ                                    !whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.textContains('\n')
552тЖТ                                ) {

567тЖТ    private fun classSignaturesIncludingFirstSuperTypeExceedsMaxLineLength(
568тЖТ        node: ASTNode,
569тЖТ        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
570тЖТ        autoCorrect: Boolean,
571тЖТ    ): Boolean {
572тЖТ        val actualClassSignatureLength = node.getClassSignatureLength(excludeSuperTypes = false)
573тЖТ        // Calculate the length of the class signature in case it, including the super types, would be rewritten as single
574тЖТ        // line (and without a maximum line length). The white space correction will be calculated via a dry run of the
575тЖТ        // actual fix.
576тЖТ        val length =
577тЖТ            actualClassSignatureLength +
578тЖТ                // Calculate the white space correction in case the signature would be rewritten to a single line
579тЖТ                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = false, dryRun = true)

622тЖТ    private fun List<ASTNode>.childrenBetween(
623тЖТ        startASTNodePredicate: (ASTNode) -> Boolean,
624тЖТ        endASTNodePredicate: (ASTNode) -> Boolean,
625тЖТ    ): List<ASTNode> {
626тЖТ        val iterator = iterator()
627тЖТ        var currentNode: ASTNode
628тЖТ        val childrenBetween: MutableList<ASTNode> = mutableListOf()
629тЖТ
630тЖТ        while (iterator.hasNext()) {
631тЖТ            currentNode = iterator.next()
632тЖТ            if (startASTNodePredicate(currentNode)) {
633тЖТ                childrenBetween.add(currentNode)
634тЖТ                break
635тЖТ            }
636тЖТ        }
637тЖТ
638тЖТ        while (iterator.hasNext()) {
639тЖТ            currentNode = iterator.next()
640тЖТ            childrenBetween.add(currentNode)
641тЖТ            if (endASTNodePredicate(currentNode)) {
642тЖТ                break
643тЖТ            }
644тЖТ        }
645тЖТ
646тЖТ        return childrenBetween
647тЖТ    }
